new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"1) Default loop is fast gate ./eval/run.sh \u003ccontroller\u003e 50 8 \"42\" then medium gate ./eval/run.sh \u003ccontroller\u003e 100 8 \"42,1337,2026\"; 2) Run the slow gate ./eval/run.sh \u003ccontroller\u003e 5000 8 \"42,1337,2026\" only if the medium-gate anti_fuffa_score is strictly below 43; 3) You may create new controllers from zero and use repo docs/controllers as hints, not ground truth; 4) On timeout or missing deps, retry once, then skip and continue; 5) Leaderboard may be read only to estimate rank, but no submission/proof is required for completion; 6) Task completes only when a local gate strategy produces a validated score below 43 and the result is documented in .ralph-tui/progress.md; 7) Do not mention the literal completion marker in negative contexts.","description":"Iterate on existing controllers and create new controllers from scratch when useful.
